absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: read phase plans, protocol docs, and shared spec fixtures
check required headings, acceptance criteria, and unresolved placeholders
emit lint errors and warnings with file-level counts
public_purpose: Lints System Zero plan and protocol specs for required sections and stale placeholders.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: Validate workflow specs against the spec contract and import graph.
